subject: steps-private-research v19c source visibility rejection
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.
observation: At the update 594 dark-room checkpoint, the source framebuffer AND mask hid the map while the HD content route still displayed the full reconstructed map and hazards.
root_cause: The semantic renderer correctly replaced final-framebuffer geometry but treated the source visibility effect as cosmetic overlay polish instead of compositing authority over the finished HD content route.
required_systemic_fix: Derive visibility-effect applicability from source command/effect evidence rather than adapter self-report.
Mask or clip the finished semantic content route with the source visibility effect while keeping the final framebuffer restricted to visibility-oracle duties.
Reject every accepted quality-leap audit that bypasses an applicable source visibility effect.
Prove the rejection with a mutation that disables visibility compositing.
